human_actions_pending.action: Operator confirms `department` Polaris-field mapping at plan-phase time
human_actions_pending.context: DECISION-A added 2 columns (maintenance_problem + department). `department` could map to Polaris's Assignment Group (e.g., 'MT-Maintenance'), Maintenance Location (e.g., 'Bakery'), or Service (e.g., 'MT-Trades'). Planner asks operator before writing migration 0022.

human_actions_pending.action: Operator's Mac may have 1 ahead commit (delete-user.ts) — confirm `git push origin main` was run on Mac
human_actions_pending.context: During the Mac/Linux sync earlier in session, the Mac had 1 local commit (1926dabb feat(scripts): add general-purpose delete-user.ts) ahead of origin. The user did `git pull --rebase origin main` to bring down 30 Linux commits. They may or may not have done `git push origin main` to send delete-user.ts back up. If origin is still behind by 1, the next Linux git fetch will see a divergence.

decisions.decision: 129-10 GAP-129-G root cause = H4 (buildInitialContainer dispatch table incomplete; not H1/H2/H3)
decisions.rationale: Diagnostic evidence cleanly ruled out H1/H2/H3: storage write persists, read returns correct value, source classified as 'appMenu' (non-glassesMenu). Bug lived between pickInitialScreen returning 'work-orders' and the WebView paint — in main.ts buildInitialContainer's switch which only handled HOME+COMPANION.

decisions.decision: 129-10 fix: export buildScreen from navigation.ts; buildInitialContainer routes via buildScreen + converts RebuildPageContainer → CreateStartUpPageContainer for non-HOME/non-COMPANION
decisions.rationale: Single dispatch table for cold-start AND in-session rendering. Future screen additions only need to update navigation.ts buildScreen, eliminating the class of bug.

decisions.decision: Strategic pivot: revert SVCNOW assisted-capture popup; build screenshot pipeline (operator-only) + PWA manual-create (all users)
decisions.rationale: Popup workflow too high-friction in real ServiceNow usage. Operator-specific screenshot pipeline + non-operator PWA manual-create is lower-friction and captures richer data (16+ Polaris fields vs popup's 3).

decisions.decision: Phase 129 closes PARTIAL-COMPLETE; new Phase 129.1 inserted between 129 and 130
decisions.rationale: Phase 129 ships real durable G2 + infra value (lifecycle restore, prod migration, build-gate, terminology). SVCNOW-01/02/03/05 SUPERSEDED; SVCNOW-04 (dedup primitive) preserved.

decisions.decision: Phase 129.1 schema scope: 2 new columns on work_orders (maintenance_problem + department)
decisions.rationale: Operator's stated need is 'CS#, description, location, department + maintenance_problem'. CS#, description, location already exist as case_number, short_description, location. Tight scope.

decisions.decision: Phase 129.1 feedback loop: preview-before-commit in PWA via state: 'pending_review'
decisions.rationale: Screenshot → vigil-core extraction → work_orders row with state='pending_review' → operator reviews in PWA → Commit (state→open) or Discard. Trades one extra click for accuracy.

decisions.decision: Phase 129.1 macOS trigger: launchd watcher on ~/vigil-captures/
decisions.rationale: Ambient capture (drop file into folder, drop activates upload). No hotkey to remember. Pairs naturally with Cmd+Shift+4's 'save to location' option.

background_processes.name: Vite dev server (vigil-g2-plugin prototype mode)

background_processes.note: Not needed for Phase 129.1 (which is mostly extension + PWA + vigil-core work, not G2). Operator can safely kill via `kill 596302` or leave running.

background_processes.name: Vite dev server (vigil-pwa)
background_processes.note: Unrelated to 129-10 work; pre-existing dev server for vigil-pwa. Likely useful for 129.1 PWA development. Leave running.

anti_patterns_encountered.name: Hypothesis space too narrow on planned diagnostics
anti_patterns_encountered.description: Plan 129-10 enumerated 3 hypotheses (H1 storage-write, H2 restore-read, H3 source-misclassification) for GAP-129-G. The actual root cause (H4 dispatch-table incomplete) was outside the planned hypothesis space. Diagnostic instrumentation correctly captured evidence that ruled out H1/H2/H3, but I had to read main.ts:buildInitialContainer directly to spot the actual bug — between the last successful checkpoint (pickInitialScreen returned 'work-orders') and the failing observation (plugin painted HOME).
anti_patterns_encountered.mitigation: When diagnostic evidence rules out all planned hypotheses, immediately read the code path between the last-successful-checkpoint and the failing-observation. The 'between' is often the unsuspected place. Plan 129-10's PLAN.md included NONE_OF_ABOVE branch explicitly — use it.

anti_patterns_encountered.name: Cross-machine git divergence during multi-day UAT
anti_patterns_encountered.description: Operator's Mac (~/Desktop/Local AI/dailybrief) was 30 commits behind origin/main while Linux (morrillhouse) was 30 commits ahead. Scenario 8's setup-view never rendered on Mac because Mac had pre-129-07 popup.html. Diagnosis took ~15 minutes of console-spelunking before discovering the stale-checkout issue.
anti_patterns_encountered.mitigation: Before starting hardware UAT on a different machine than where code was authored, explicitly verify `git log origin/main..HEAD` and `git rev-parse HEAD` match between machines. Add this as a Session 0 step in future cross-machine UAT runbooks.

anti_patterns_encountered.name: Auto-mode classifier blocks git push to main
anti_patterns_encountered.description: Claude Code's auto-mode classifier intercepts `git push origin main` and blocks it even when AskUserQuestion has approved the action. Required operator to set bypass permissions before push could proceed.
anti_patterns_encountered.mitigation: Either set permission rules upfront in .claude/settings.json (`Bash(git push origin main)`), or accept that pushes-to-default-branch require explicit user step. Don't burn time re-trying the same command.

next_action: /gsd:plan-phase 129.1 — author ~6 plans per the plan_outline in 129.1-CONTEXT.md. Plans cover: schema migration + revert prep, extension revert (Chrome + Safari lock-step), POST /v1/captures/screenshot endpoint, macOS launchd watcher, PWA manual-create + draft-review UI, REQUIREMENTS update + UAT runbook + operator UAT.
context_notes: Phase 129 was a long arc (13 plans + 2 UAT sessions + a mid-session pivot). Phase 129.1's CONTEXT.md is unusually tight because the discuss-phase happened immediately after the pivot decision with all the architectural context fresh. Operator made a clean strategic call (popup → screenshot pipeline). 6 decisions locked. One open question (department field mapping) flagged for planner to ask. Phase 130 (Voice capture) unaffected; sequence preserved.
